text.title: UAT Script Pattern Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply UAT Script Pattern end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: collect-acs
step.action: Extract every acceptance criterion with id.

step.name: draft-steps
step.action: Write atomic numbered steps; one AC → ≥1 step.

step.name: attach-expected-results
step.action: Each step gets a measurable expected_result.

step.name: execute-and-log
step.action: Tester runs each step; logs pass/fail + defect ids.
